creator: aaron.miller04@gmail.com
text:
I installed FreeBSD without any unusual options, but with ZFS and disk encryption (I didn't do any command line stuff during the install, just selected those options in the installer). I selected a Dvorak keylayout.

Expected:
  My passphrase is asked for once, using Dvorak, during boot.

Actual:
  My passphrase is asked for using Dvorak, then much later in the boot (after the daemon ASCII art), I am asked for the passphrase again, and I have to use the qwerty keylayout. The prompt for the second time reads "Enter passphrase for ada0p4: ".
